loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active power and import energy as proxies for HV input/LV output comparison; per-phase or distinct HV/LV metering data is not available for this asset.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing active power load profile and derived load factor; specific 'expected load' and 'anomaly' event columns are not present in the asset's schema, so the card displays available power data and derived metrics.
